description: Jaipur, the capital of Rajasthan, is a royal city full of history, colours, palaces and vibrant culture. Known as the Pink City, Jaipur is famous for its majestic forts, grand architecture, colourful bazaars and a perfect blend of heritage and lifestyle. From exploring the iconic Amer Fort and Hawa Mahal to strolling through the bustling streets of Johari Bazaar, Jaipur offers a journey back in time to the glorious era of Rajput kings. Enjoy traditional Rajasthani food, shop for handicrafts, jewellery and block prints, and witness the city’s charm in its palaces, museums and old streets. Jaipur is a destination that delivers royal experiences, cultural richness and unforgettable memories for every traveller.

Any services not specifically mentioned in the inclusions.

Anything Not mentioned in inclusions.

faqs.title: 1) What is Jaipur best known for?
faqs.content: Jaipur is known for its royal palaces, forts, heritage architecture, colourful bazaars, jewellery and traditional Rajasthani culture.

faqs.title: 2) What is the best time to visit Jaipur?
faqs.content: October to March is the ideal season with pleasant weather for sightseeing.

faqs.title: 3) What are the main attractions included?
faqs.content: Amer Fort, City Palace, Hawa Mahal, Jantar Mantar, Jal Mahal, Nahargarh Fort, local markets.

faqs.title: 4) What food is Jaipur famous for?
faqs.content: Dal Baati Churma, Ghevar, Pyaaz Kachori, Rajasthani Thali and traditional sweets.

faqs.title: 5) What should we carry?
faqs.content: Comfortable shoes, sunglasses, hats/caps (for sun), light clothing in summer, and a light jacket in winter.
